source.prompt:
Project title: The Delivery.
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 1 of 5: Strange Deliveries Begin.
Section purpose: To establish the initial intrigue and humor of the situation..
Beat 1 of 3 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: A college student named Mia started getting food deliveries she never ordered.
Next beat narration: At first, it was funny. One night: ramen. Next night: bubble tea. Then groceries.

Visual target:
A dimly lit college apartment, cluttered with books and a laptop, showing a delivery bag on the table. A clock shows late evening.

Create a vertical 9:16 photorealistic cinematic still for a suspense story video.
Depict the exact current beat, not a generic mood board and not a later event.
Preserve continuity with the immediately previous and next beats, but do not introduce objects, characters, or reveals that have not happened yet.
Use natural lens perspective, believable human anatomy, grounded lighting, subtle film grain, and environmental detail.
Avoid glossy AI fantasy style, plastic skin, over-smoothed faces, surreal distortions, extra fingers, fake text, UI, subtitles, watermarks, logos, split screens, and soundwave graphics.
Make it look like a frame from an atmospheric indie thriller shot on a real camera.

Project title: The Delivery.
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 2 of 5: The Misunderstanding.
Section purpose: To introduce tension and build suspense through misunderstanding..
Beat 1 of 2 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: Mia thought it was her boyfriend being sweet, so she texted him. He said, 'What deliveries?'
Next beat narration: That's when she checked the receipts. The orders were paid for by someone named Mia Chen—her exact name.

Visual target:
A split screen showing Mia texting on her bed, looking hopeful, and her boyfriend looking confused on his phone.

Create a vertical 9:16 photorealistic cinematic still for a suspense story video.

Project title: The Delivery.
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 3 of 5: Unanswered Questions.
Section purpose: To create an escalating sense of dread and suspense..
Beat 1 of 2 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: But the phone number was different. So Mia called it.
Next beat narration: Across the room, inside her locked closet, a phone started ringing.

Visual target:
Mia hesitates before dialing a strange number, her face illuminated by her phone's glow.

Project title: The Delivery.
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 4 of 5: The Knock on the Door.
Section purpose: To heighten suspense and lead to the climax..
Beat 1 of 2 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: Then the delivery app pinged again. 'Your driver is arriving.' A second later, there was a knock.
Next beat narration: Mia looked through the peephole. No driver. Just a paper bag on the floor.

Visual target:
Mia in a panic, standing still, her eyes wide as the knock echoes throughout her quiet apartment.

Project title: The Delivery.
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 5 of 5: A Haunting Revelation.
Section purpose: To reveal the climax's intensity and mystery..
Beat 1 of 2 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: Inside was her student ID. The one she had lost three years ago.
Next beat narration: And a note: 'I’ve been taking care of you longer than you think.'

Visual target:
Mia kneeling to pick up the bag, revealing a familiar ID card that she stares at in disbelief.
